title: GOOD: testnet as default network prevents accidental mainnet loss
description: --network defaults to 'testnet' in main.rs (value_parser restricts to mainnet|testnet). During Phase 2 development, every wallet command and payment defaults to the testnet chain. A developer who forgets the flag cannot accidentally spend real ZEC. Mainnet requires a deliberate --network mainnet. The README also documents this explicitly. The right time to flip the default to mainnet is Phase 3, at mainnet readiness, not before.
close_reason: Review finding acknowledged — existing implementation is correct, no change needed
